sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thungetna in lungsim sunga, lunggulh takna ahi;
Mei bang hong lumsak awm sunga, deihna lian pen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khasiatna, khitui luanna zong, thungetna mah ahi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhnei mi khat lungsim tak tawh, kisikin thuum peuh
Vantung mite’n nuamin kiko, “En aw, thungen taveh”

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: ding thungetna in, hinna hu bang ahi;
Thungetna tawh sih kong panin, vantung khua ah lut

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Nangmah hinna thuman lampi, pa kiang tunna dingin;
